description_long: This object is a medium-sized terracotta plant pot filled with soil and supporting a lush, broad-leafed green plant. The plant features large, jagged-edged leaves that radiate outward, creating a wide, low profile. At the center and among the leaves, several small pink flowers with yellow centers are visible, adding a touch of color to the otherwise green foliage. The pot itself is unadorned, with a classic, slightly tapered cylindrical shape and a warm, earthy brown color. The surface of the pot appears matte and slightly rough, typical of unglazed terracotta. This potted plant would be well-suited for placement in urban parks, sidewalks, or patios, providing a decorative and natural element to the environment.
description: A terracotta pot with broad-leafed green foliage and small pink flowers, featuring a classic, unadorned design. The plant's wide leaves and colorful blooms make it a vibrant decorative piece.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of large, jagged green leaves and the central pink flower clearly visible above the pot.
description_view_1: Side view with leaves extending outward, partially obscuring the flowers and giving a sense of the plant's width.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the central pink flower and the layered arrangement of leaves around the pot.
description_view_3: Another side view with a clear look at the leaf structure and a few visible pink flowers peeking through the foliage.
attribute_plant_species: broad-leafed flowering plant (possibly Gerbera daisy or similar)
